items.headline: Los Angeles Dodgers put closer Edwin Diaz on injured list
items.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers placed Edwin Diaz, 32, the right-handed closer in his first season with the club, on the 15-day injured list with right elbow loose bodies Monday, a day after he allowed three runs to the Colorado Rockies without recording an out.

items.headline: Fantasy Baseball Reliever Depth Chart
items.description: Our updated reliever depth chart displays the closer hierarchy for each team, as well as the fatigue factor in each MLB bullpen.

items.headline: Expert tips, best tips for Round 7 of the AFL
items.description: Who should you be tipping in Round 7 of the 2026 AFL season? Our footy experts have put their heads together to help you out. So open your ESPN Footytips app, take notes, and get ahead of the game!

items.headline: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior wants to change perceptions of squad
items.description: Liam Rosenior is determined to change perceptions of  Chelsea's squad amid ongoing scrutiny of his players' conduct during a worrying slump in form.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Tuesday: Steven Matz positioned for success
items.description: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Tuesday's MLB action.

items.headline: Ivan Toney seals Al Ahli rally, spot in Asian Champions League final
items.description: Defending champion Al Ahli reached the final of the AFC Champions League Elite after Ivan Toney's second-half goal beat Vissel Kobe of Japan 2-1 on Monday.

items.headline: Capitals ready if Alex Ovechkin decides to return or retire
items.description: Capitals brass say they are prepared for whatever decision captain Alex Ovechkin makes. The 40-year-old is deciding whether or not he will return for a 22nd NHL season.

items.headline: NBA breaks ties for 2026 draft position; Jazz keep protected pick
items.description: The NBA conducted its tiebreaking process for the league's 2026 draft, setting the order from 15 to 30 and breaking a pair of ties among teams nestled inside the lottery.

items.headline: Niners' Fred Warner fully healthy after season-ending injury
items.description: Fred Warner is "feeling great and no restrictions" for the start of Niners' offseason program after suffering a season-ending ankle injury last October.

items.headline: UConn's Solo Ball to have wrist surgery, miss all of next season
items.description: UConn guard Solo Ball will undergo wrist surgery and miss the entire 2026-27 season.

items.headline: 2026 NBA draft order: Pre-lottery picks for first, second rounds
items.description: Where does the NBA draft order stand ahead of next month's lottery? We have you covered.

items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal continue with interest for Álvarez
items.description: Arsenal reportedly remain interested in Atlético Madrid and Argentina forward Julián Álvarez.

items.headline: Star Pie wants fast start against improving Bombers
items.description: Nick Daicos wants the end of their win over Carlton to be the start of the AFL Anzac Day blockbuster against Essendon.

items.headline: Chelsea Clinton runs Boston Marathon in personal best time
items.description: With her parents, Bill and Hillary Clinton, waiting at the finish line to congratulate her, former first daughter Chelsea Clinton, 46, the vice chair of the Clinton Foundation, finished the Boston Marathon on Monday in 3 hours, 40 minutes, 52 seconds.

items.headline: Rockets' Kevin Durant game-time decision for Game 2
items.description: Rockets star Kevin Durant went through about half of Houston's practice Monday and will be a game-time decision for Game 2 on Tuesday.
